description: A manager asks an FP&A analyst to analyze the Marketing department's spending for the year to date.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all transactions coded to the Marketing department for the current year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully pulls the detailed transaction data.

nodes.task_description: Categorize the spending by expense type (e.g., advertising, software, events).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly categorizes the spending and identifies the top 3 spending categories.

nodes.task_description: Create a summary report with charts to present the findings to the manager.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a clear, visual report summarizing the department's spending.
